page.title: Finish account setup
page.description: Complete these steps before entering your workspace.

terms.summary: By continuing, you agree to use Modulith according to the workspace terms and acknowledge how account data is processed for authentication, notifications, audit history, and account administration.
terms.acceptTerms: I accept the terms and privacy policy
terms.acceptMarketing: Send me product updates by email

password.title: Set an initial password
password.description: Add a password if you want to sign in without Google later.
password.verifyDescription: Re-verify the Google account you signed up with to protect this account before adding a password.
password.googleUnavailable: Google sign-in is not configured. Contact your administrator to finish onboarding.

avatar.title: Add a profile picture
avatar.description: Optional. You can change it later in Profile settings.
avatar.replaceHint: We imported this from your Google account. Replace, remove, or keep it.

complete.title: Ready to enter Modulith
complete.description: We'll save your onboarding choices and open the app.
